faq.question: How do I search for medicines on eDrugs?
faq.answer: You can search for medicines using the search bar at the top of every page. Just type the medicine name (e.g., 'Paracetamol' or 'Augmentin') and results will appear instantly. You can also browse medicines by category using the category navigation bar below the header.

faq.question: How do I add medicines to my cart?
faq.answer:
To add a medicine to your cart:
1. Search for the medicine or browse the catalog at /medicines
2. Click on any medicine card to view its details
3. On the medicine detail page, click 'Add to Cart'
4. You'll see a confirmation and the cart icon in the navbar will update
5. You can view your cart anytime by clicking the cart icon in the top-right corner

faq.question: How do I proceed to checkout?
faq.answer:
To checkout:
1. Click the cart icon in the top-right corner to go to /cart
2. Review your items and adjust quantities if needed
3. Click 'Proceed to Checkout' to go to the checkout page (/checkout)
4. Enter your delivery address and select a payment method
5. Review your order summary and click 'Place Order'
6. You'll receive an order confirmation

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer:
We accept multiple payment methods including:
- Credit Cards (Visa, Mastercard)
- Debit Cards
- Digital Payment Methods
- Cash on Delivery (COD) for select areas
All online payments are processed securely with encryption.

faq.question: How long does delivery take?
faq.answer:
Delivery times depend on your location:
- Standard Delivery: 2-3 business days (Free for orders above PKR 2000)
- Express Delivery: 1 business day (PKR 200-500 depending on location)

Delivery hours: 9 AM to 6 PM (Monday to Saturday)
Medicines are delivered in secure packaging with temperature control where necessary.

faq.question: Can I track my order?
faq.answer:
Yes! Once your order is confirmed:
1. You'll receive a tracking number via email
2. Go to your dashboard at /dashboard
3. Click on the order to see its current status
4. You can track each step from 'Order Placed' to 'Delivered'

faq.question: Do I need a prescription for medicines?
faq.answer: Some medicines require a valid prescription. On each medicine's detail page, you'll see a badge indicating if it's 'Prescription Required' or 'OTC (Over The Counter)'. For prescription medicines, you can upload your prescription during checkout. Our pharmacist team will verify it before dispatching.

faq.question: What is the return policy?
faq.answer:
Our return policy:
- Unopened and unused medicines can be returned within 7 days of delivery for a full refund
- Prescription medicines cannot be returned for safety reasons
- Damaged or wrong items will be replaced immediately
- Contact our support team through the chatbot or email for return requests

faq.question: How do I create an account?
faq.answer:
To create an account:
1. Click the user icon in the top-right corner of the navbar
2. Select 'Create Account' from the dropdown
3. Or navigate directly to /signup
4. Enter your email address and create a password
5. Fill in your personal details (name, phone number)
6. Click 'Sign Up' to create your account
7. You'll be logged in automatically

faq.question: How do I log in?
faq.answer:
To log in:
1. Click the user icon in the top-right corner of the navbar
2. Select 'Sign In' from the dropdown
3. Or navigate directly to /login
4. Enter your email and password
5. Click 'Sign In' to access your account

Once logged in, you can access your dashboard, order history, and profile.

faq.question: How do I view my profile?
faq.answer:
To view or edit your profile:
1. Make sure you're logged in
2. Click the user icon in the top-right corner
3. Select 'Profile' from the dropdown
4. Or navigate directly to /profile
5. Here you can update your personal details, change password, and manage delivery addresses

faq.question: How do I view my orders?
faq.answer:
To view your orders:
1. Make sure you're logged in
2. Click the user icon and select 'My Orders'
3. Or navigate directly to /dashboard
4. You'll see all your past and current orders with their status
5. Click on any order to see its full details

faq.question: What categories of medicines are available?
faq.answer:
We have medicines in many categories including:
- Antibiotics
- Pain Relievers
- Cold & Flu
- Digestive Health
- Skincare & Dermatology
- Antihistamines (Allergy)
- Antifungals
- Anti-inflammatory
- Gels & Topicals
- Vitamins & Supplements

Browse all categories using the category navigation bar below the header, or go to /medicines to see the full catalog.

faq.question: How do I contact support?
faq.answer:
You can reach us through:
- This chatbot assistant (available 24/7)
- The contact page on our website
- Email support

Our team typically responds within 24 hours during business days.

faq.question: Is my data safe?
faq.answer:
Yes, your data is completely safe. We use:
- Secure authentication powered by Supabase
- Encrypted payment processing
- HTTPS encryption for all data transfer
- We never share your personal or medical information with third parties

faq.question: What is eDrugs.pk?
faq.answer:
eDrugs.pk is Pakistan's online medicine e-commerce platform. We provide:
- A wide catalog of verified medicines
- Easy search and browsing by category
- Secure online ordering and checkout
- Fast delivery across Pakistan
- Prescription verification for controlled medicines
- User dashboards to track orders

Our mission is to make medicine accessible and affordable for everyone in Pakistan.

main_sections.name: Home
main_sections.description: Main landing page with featured medicines, promotions, and quick access to popular categories. You'll find trending medicines and health tips here.
main_sections.how_to_access: Click the 'Edrugs.pk' logo in the top-left corner or navigate to the root URL

main_sections.name: Medicines Catalog
main_sections.description: Browse all available medicines. You can filter by category, search by name, sort by price, and view detailed information about each medicine.
main_sections.how_to_access: Click on any category in the navigation bar below the header, or go to /medicines

main_sections.name: Medicine Detail
main_sections.description: View detailed information about a specific medicine including composition, manufacturer, price, side effects, and whether a prescription is required. You can add the medicine to your cart from here.
main_sections.how_to_access: Click on any medicine card in the catalog or search results

main_sections.name: Shopping Cart
main_sections.description: View all items you've added to your cart. You can adjust quantities, remove items, and see the total amount before proceeding to checkout.
main_sections.how_to_access: Click the shopping cart icon in the top-right corner of the navbar

main_sections.name: Checkout
main_sections.description: Complete your purchase by entering delivery address, selecting payment method, and reviewing your order summary.
main_sections.how_to_access: Click 'Proceed to Checkout' from the cart page

main_sections.name: User Dashboard
main_sections.description: View your order history, track current orders, and manage your account. Shows all past and active orders with their status.
main_sections.how_to_access: Click the user icon → 'My Orders' (requires login)

main_sections.name: Profile
main_sections.description: View and edit your personal information, change password, and manage your delivery addresses.

main_sections.name: Login
main_sections.description: Sign in to your existing account with email and password to access protected features like order tracking and checkout.

main_sections.name: Sign Up
main_sections.description: Create a new account on eDrugs.pk. Enter your email, password, and personal details to start ordering medicines.

main_sections.name: Admin Dashboard
main_sections.description: Admin-only area for managing products, viewing all orders, and managing the platform. Only accessible by admin accounts.
main_sections.how_to_access: Available only to admin users after login

steps: Search for the medicine using the search bar or browse the catalog (/medicines)
Click on the medicine to view details
Click the cart icon to review your cart (/cart)
Enter delivery details and place your order
Find your order in the list
Click on it to see detailed tracking information
Look at the category navigation bar below the header
You'll see all medicines in that category
Use filters to narrow down results
Click the user icon in the top-right corner
Select 'My Orders' to view order history (/dashboard)
Use 'Logout' to sign out of your account

delivery.information: We deliver to all major cities in Pakistan including Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Faisalabad, Multan, Peshawar, and Quetta.

shipping_methods.cost: Free for orders above PKR 2000, PKR 150 otherwise

delivery.note: Medicines are delivered in secure packaging with temperature control where necessary. A delivery confirmation SMS will be sent to your registered phone number.

platform_info.name: eDrugs.pk
platform_info.description: eDrugs.pk is an e-commerce platform for purchasing medicines online in Pakistan. We offer a wide range of verified medicines with fast delivery, secure payments, and prescription verification.
